name: Founder OS - Missed Schedule Alert

meta.description: Daily 17:00 Europe/Oslo alert when scheduled content is overdue or open tasks are high urgency.

primaryPipeline.canonical: crm.content_calendar + crm.content_tasks via Supabase RPC content_tasks_due(current_date)
primaryPipeline.note: Missed schedule detection is already modeled in content_tasks_due() missed_content CTE — n8n should query, not reimplement business rules.

missedCalendarItems.filter: scheduled_at IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_at <= now() AND status <> 'published'

optionalTaskGeneration.note: Run once before alert if daily task rows may be stale.

steps: Optionally call generate_content_tasks(current_date) to refresh open tasks from cadence.
Query crm.content_calendar for scheduled_at <= now() and status != published.
Merge and de-duplicate by related_content_id where present.
If zero items: exit silently (no alert spam).
Upsert or append crm.content_tasks for missed schedule_post rows when not already open.
Send concise founder alert (email or Slack) listing channel, hook, scheduled_at, owner.
guardrails: Use Europe/Oslo timezone on cron trigger.
Do not alert when there are zero missed or high-urgency items.
Prefer content_tasks_due() over ad-hoc SQL so rules stay aligned with Founder OS functions.
Idempotent daily alert — track last_alerted_at on content_calendar.notes or external dedupe key to avoid duplicate pings.

sampleAlertItems.note: Content item passed schedule time without being published.
